title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages
summary: Review of iteration #8 changes addressing greptile-apps[bot] review #7 feedback. Two targeted fixes: (1) InjectOsloPolicyConfig now guards against nil config map to prevent panic, with corresponding test case added; (2) RenderPastePipeline now returns an error for completely empty pipelines (no filters, no app) instead of silently producing a meaningless section, with corresponding test added. Both changes are minimal, correct, and well-tested.

tests_checklist.item: Tests do not mutate shared state

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (Gomega dot-import, NewGomegaWithT)
No dead code or commented-out code
License headers and Feature: CC-0004 present

security_checklist.item: All functions are pure — no Kubernetes API calls
No path traversal or injection risks

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
Changes are minimal and scoped to the reported issues

fail_fast_checklist.item: Nil config detected early in InjectOsloPolicyConfig
Empty pipeline detected early in RenderPastePipeline

review_walkthrough.1_INTENT: Address greptile-apps[bot] review #7 feedback: (a) nil config panic in InjectOsloPolicyConfig, (b) empty pipeline silent acceptance in RenderPastePipeline.
review_walkthrough.2_SCOPE: 4 files changed (config.go, config_test.go, plugins.go, plugins_test.go) — all within scope. No scope creep.
review_walkthrough.3_VERIFICATION: go test -v: ALL PASS (config: 26 subtests, plugins: 19 subtests). go test -cover: config 100%, plugins 100%. go vet: clean. golangci-lint: 0 issues.
review_walkthrough.4_PATTERNS: Gomega dot-import with NewGomegaWithT(t) — matches mandatory pattern. Table-driven tests — matches existing convention. License headers and Feature tracking — present.
review_walkthrough.5_TESTS: New test TestInjectOsloPolicyConfig/nil_config covers the nil guard. New TestRenderPastePipeline_emptyPipelineReturnsError covers the empty pipeline error path. Both verify error messages contain expected substrings.
review_walkthrough.6_SECURITY: Pure functions only, no external I/O, no injection vectors. N/A.
review_walkthrough.7_COMPLEXITY: Minimal changes: one nil guard (1 line), one early-return error check (4 lines). Simplest possible fixes.
review_walkthrough.8_COMPLETENESS: Both review feedback items addressed. No stubs or TODOs.
